description: Deathbed will of Bū Saʿd b. Sālim. Location: Minyat Zifta. Dated: last third of Tammuz [1469] Seleucid = June 1158 CE. (The year in l. 2 is too faded to read but is deduced from the letters around the signature of Mevorakh b. Natan in the second validation on verso, which give Av 1469 Seleucid = June/July 1158 CE.) In which irdabbs of wheat were assigned to the heqdesh (pious trust) and another purpose. Other people mentioned include his sister's daughter Karam bt. Bū l-Faraj; Bū l-Maʿānī b. Asad; Abū l-Futūḥ Ibn Ḥadīda; Yosef b. [...]; his sister's orphan children; and his wife. Witnesses: Shela b. Ḥalfon; Mevorakh b. Natan ha-Gevir (appears also in PER H 91 (PGPID 7033) and T-S AS 204.324 (PGPID 33849)); Yosef b. Yefet. There are two validations, which is rare. The first is signed by Yefet b. Moshe; Yiṣḥaq b. Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen; and Tiqva b. Elʿazar. The second is on verso and is signed by the court of Fustat: Ḥiyya b. Yiṣḥaq, Efrayim b. Meshullam, and Mevorakh b. Natan he-Ḥaver. (Information in part from CUDL and Mediterranean Society, V, p. 543.). Join: Alan Elbaum. OZ/ASE
description_he: צוואת ערש דווי של בו סעד ב' סאלם, מנית זיפתא, שליש אחרון של תמוז [1469] לספירת השטרות (יוני 1158). הקצה ארדבי חיטה לקדש ולמטרה אחרת. עדים: שלה ב' חלפון, מבורך ב' נתן הגביר, יוסף ב' יפת.
